title: Anthropic Vision
description: A component that connects to Anthropic's Claude vision-capable models for image analysis,
OCR, visual understanding, and scene description. Supports Claude Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models
with multimodal capabilities. Features robust error handling, automatic image processing,
and flexible prompt configuration for a wide range of vision use cases.

input.description: Image to analyze with Claude Vision models

output.description: Text analysis of the image content

input.description: Image documents to analyze with Claude Vision models

output.description: Text analysis of each image document with original metadata (frame number, timestamp) preserved

claude-sonnet-4-6.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 - Balanced Speed & Quality (200K tokens)

claude-haiku-4-5.title: Claude Haiku 4.5 - Fastest & Most Affordable (200K tokens)

image_vision_anthropic.apikey.description: Anthropic API key. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com

vision.systemPrompt.title: System Instructions
vision.systemPrompt.description: Define the model's role and behavior for image analysis

vision.prompt.title: Analysis Prompt
vision.prompt.description: Describe what you want to analyze or extract from the image

image_vision_anthropic.profile.title: Vision Model
image_vision_anthropic.profile.description: Select the Claude vision model to use
